mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply (seq, writer, contents, write_date, parent_seq) VALUES (reply_seq.NEXTVAL, #{writer}, #{contents}, SYSDATE, #{parent_seq})
mapper.select: SELECT seq, writer, contents, write_date, parent_seq FROM reply WHERE parent_seq = #{parent_seq} ORDER BY seq DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET contents = #{contents} WHERE seq = #{seq}
